repo.name: watchstate
repo.description: Self-hosted service to sync your plex, jellyfin and emby play state. without relying on 3rd-party external services.

repo.name: phpdotenv
repo.description: Loads environment variables from `.env` to `getenv()`, `$_ENV` and `$_SERVER` automagically.

repo.name: docker-adminer
repo.description: Database management in a single PHP file

repo.name: ai-services
repo.description: Makes AI centrally available in WordPress, whether via PHP, REST API, JavaScript, or WP-CLI - for any provider.
